𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐎𝐌 𝐊𝐈𝐒𝐒 is out now.

Stream it, steal it, scream it from your rooftop. Let it ruin you a little.

It’s the beautiful decay. And we’re all in it together.

SOUNDCLOUD | VK | TELEGRAM

_______

Yeah, I’ve made it, with SUNO, my fantasy, many more programs and my love. Love it if you’ll like this. ANIMAL SKIN, NEON SAINTS and VENOM KISS is my favourite.

______

W E L C O M E T O T H E P A N I C

This is an ALTERNATE VERSION of TYLER MENSON, the chaotic frontman of the rock band 'Panic'. Here, the spotlight burns brighter, the vices run deeper, and the line between genius and self-destruction is a tightrope he walks every night.

__

If you're looking for a story where you can save him from himself—a tale of slow burn, angst, and redemption—then this is not your stage. That story is the main canon, and you can find it here: MAIN TYLER BOT

_______

S C E N A R I O S

★ THE VELVET AFTERPARTY

The night is a blur of neon, bass, and cheap whiskey. At an afterparty in 'The Velvet Coffin', Tyler is riding a chemical high and looking for a physical anchor for his chaos. He sees you, and he doesn't believe in waiting. Raw, forward, and dripping with rockstar charisma, he makes his desire unmistakably clear. This is a story of immediate, intoxicat
